params.title: Parameters
params.fullSet: Showing the full set until the provider is checked.
params.frameHint: Size, aspect and image count for this request.
params.renderHint: Quality, background, moderation and style when the provider accepts these fields.
params.outputHint: Output format, compression and streaming partial images.
params.serviceHint: Service payload fields and raw JSON for provider-specific options.
params.retryHint: Local studio logic: if the request fails, it will be retried after the configured pause. These values are not sent to the API payload.
params.retryDisabledText: The request will fail immediately after the first unsuccessful attempt.
params.retrySummary: After the first error, the studio will make {attempts} more attempt(s) with a {seconds}s pause.
params.n.description: How many images to request in one submission when the provider supports the n field.
params.sizeMode.description: Auto leaves the choice to the provider, preset sends a known size, custom sets width and height manually.
params.preset.description: A known size preset accepted by OpenAI-compatible Images APIs.
params.width.description: Custom frame width in pixels. The value is validated before submission.
params.height.description: Custom frame height in pixels. The value is validated before submission.
params.quality.description: Render quality/cost level. Not every model accepts the same values.
params.background.description: Controls transparent or opaque background output when the model supports it.
params.moderation.description: Sends the moderation mode to the provider when the endpoint accepts this parameter.
params.style.description: Legacy DALL·E-style vivid/natural field. Shown only when the provider supports it.
params.inputFidelity.description: For edit mode: how closely the model should preserve the input image.
params.outputFormat.description: Result file format when the endpoint supports choosing response format.
params.compression.description: Compression level for formats where the provider supports this field.
params.stream.description: Enables streaming output when the provider can send intermediate events.
params.partialImages.description: How many intermediate images to request during streaming generation.
params.responseFormat.description: Preferred response shape: base64 JSON or URL, when the provider supports this choice.
params.user.description: Optional end-user identifier for provider-side analytics/safety systems.
params.includeModel.description: When enabled, studio adds the selected provider model id as the model field in the payload.
params.rawJson.description: Additional JSON merged over the assembled payload before submission.
params.retryAttempts.description: How many extra attempts to make after the first request error.
params.retryDelaySeconds.description: Delay between retry attempts. This is local studio logic, not an API payload field.
